institution.name: Fond du Lac Tribal and Community College

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fond du Lac Tribal and Community College fell 19% between 2022 and 2024 (31.8% → 25.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fond du Lac Tribal and Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fond du Lac Tribal and Community College rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (412 → 557).
